mapper.select: SELECT id, username AS userName, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, username AS userName, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, username AS userName, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( username, title, content, name, start_date, end_date ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{title}, #{content}, #{name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET username = #{userName}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
